rate_limits.search_api_specific: 5 requests per second per authentication token

auth_notes: HubSpot supports two primary authentication methods: 1. Private App Access Tokens: A Bearer token generated within the HubSpot portal, passed in the 'Authorization' header as 'Bearer [YOUR_TOKEN]'. 2. OAuth 2.0: Recommended for public integrations, requiring a standard OAuth flow to obtain an access token, also passed via the 'Authorization: Bearer' header. All requests must be made over HTTPS.

effort_recommendation.rationale: No native node - requires HTTP Request configuration
